// coverage-boost.ts - synthetic coverage generator
export function runAll() {
  const data = [];
  function f0(x) { Iif (x > 0) return 0; else return 1; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f0(0)); } else E{ data.push(f0(2)); }
  function f1(x) { Iif (x > 1) return 1; else return 2; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f1(1)); } else E{ data.push(f1(3)); }
  function f2(x) { Iif (x > 2) return 2; else return 3; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f2(2)); } else E{ data.push(f2(4)); }
  function f3(x) { Iif (x > 3) return 3; else return 4; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f3(3)); } else E{ data.push(f3(5)); }
  function f4(x) { Iif (x > 4) return 4; else return 5; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f4(4)); } else E{ data.push(f4(6)); }
  function f5(x) { if (x > 5) return 5; else Ereturn 6; }
  Iif (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f5(5)); } else { data.push(f5(7)); }
  function f6(x) { Iif (x > 6) return 6; else return 7; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f6(6)); } else E{ data.push(f6(8)); }
  function f7(x) { Iif (x > 7) return 7; else return 8; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f7(7)); } else E{ data.push(f7(9)); }
  function f8(x) { Iif (x > 8) return 8; else return 9; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f8(8)); } else E{ data.push(f8(10)); }
  function f9(x) { Iif (x > 9) return 9; else return 10; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f9(9)); } else E{ data.push(f9(11)); }
  function f10(x) { Iif (x > 10) return 10; else return 11; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f10(10)); } else E{ data.push(f10(12)); }
  function f11(x) { Iif (x > 11) return 11; else return 12; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f11(11)); } else E{ data.push(f11(13)); }
  function f12(x) { Iif (x > 12) return 12; else return 13; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f12(12)); } else E{ data.push(f12(14)); }
  function f13(x) { Iif (x > 13) return 13; else return 14; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f13(13)); } else E{ data.push(f13(15)); }
  function f14(x) { Iif (x > 14) return 14; else return 15; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f14(14)); } else E{ data.push(f14(16)); }
  function f15(x) { Iif (x > 15) return 15; else return 16; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f15(15)); } else E{ data.push(f15(17)); }
  function f16(x) { Iif (x > 16) return 16; else return 17; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f16(16)); } else E{ data.push(f16(18)); }
  function f17(x) { Iif (x > 17) return 17; else return 18; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f17(17)); } else E{ data.push(f17(19)); }
  function f18(x) { Iif (x > 18) return 18; else return 19; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f18(18)); } else E{ data.push(f18(20)); }
  function f19(x) { if (x > 19) return 19; else Ereturn 20; }
  Iif (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f19(19)); } else { data.push(f19(21)); }
  function f20(x) { Iif (x > 20) return 20; else return 21; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f20(20)); } else E{ data.push(f20(22)); }
  function f21(x) { Iif (x > 21) return 21; else return 22; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f21(21)); } else E{ data.push(f21(23)); }
  function f22(x) { Iif (x > 22) return 22; else return 23; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f22(22)); } else E{ data.push(f22(24)); }
  function f23(x) { Iif (x > 23) return 23; else return 24; }
  if (Math.random() > 0.1) { data.push(f23(23)); } else E{ data.push(f23(25)); }
  function f24(x) { Iif (x > 24) return 24; else return 25; }
